product_overview: AmeriLend is a web-based lending platform that enables borrowers to pre-qualify, apply for, and manage loans while providing secure payment processing (Stripe) and administrative workflows for loan review and servicing. The product focuses on transparency, repayment tracking, and efficient loan servicing for both end users and admins.
core_goals: Provide a simple, secure user flow for pre-qualification, loan application, and repayment management.
Process payments reliably using Stripe Payment Intents and support an enhanced crypto payment UI for experimental flows.
Surface accurate loan and payment information in a user dashboard with clear notifications and history.
Enable administrative review, approval/rejection, and monitoring of loan applications with analytics.
Maintain security and compliance best practices (HTTPS, token auth, webhook verification, PCI-safe card handling).
Offer accessible user support (contact form, AI chat widget, support center) and robust error/validation handling.

features.name: Homepage and Navigation
features.description: Landing page with marketing content, navigation menu, and call-to-action buttons that guide visitors to pre-qualification and application flows.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> View hero section with marketing copy -> Click Apply Now or Get Started button -> Navigate to /apply -> See loan application start page
Navigate to / -> Click navigation menu links -> Click About -> Navigate to /about -> View page content
Navigate to / -> Click Apply Now or Get Started button -> Network error loading /apply -> See 404 not found page

features.name: Pre-Qualification Check Offers
features.description: Public pre-qualification flow where users enter personal and financial details to view pre-qualified loan offers with APR and monthly payments.
user_flows: Navigate to /check-offers -> Fill first name input field -> Fill last name input field -> Fill email input field -> Fill annual income field -> Fill estimated credit score field -> Click Check My Offers button -> View pre-qualified offers list with APR and monthly payment
Navigate to /prequalify -> Fill first name input field -> Leave email input field blank -> Click Check My Offers button -> See validation error message for required email field
Navigate to /check-offers -> Fill all inputs -> Click Check My Offers button -> API returns server error -> See error message and retry CTA

features.name: Loan Application
features.description: Multi-step loan application for unauthenticated users including loan selection, personal and employment details, document upload, and application submission with duplicate checks.
user_flows: Navigate to /apply -> Select loan type from dropdown -> Enter loan amount -> Fill personal information (name, email, phone, DOB, SSN) -> Fill employment and income details -> Upload verification documents -> Click Submit application button -> View application confirmation with tracking number
Navigate to /apply -> Fill personal information -> Click Submit application button -> Server identifies duplicate application -> See duplicate application warning and guidance
Navigate to /apply -> Upload verification documents -> Network disruption during upload -> See file upload error message and option to retry

features.name: OTP Login and Signup
features.description: OTP-based authentication allowing users to request a one-time code via email/phone, verify the code, and authenticate to access protected areas.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Enter email address in input field -> Click Send OTP button -> Enter OTP code received via email -> Click Verify button to authenticate -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See active loans summary
Navigate to /signup -> Enter email address in input field -> Click Send OTP button -> Enter incorrect OTP code -> Click Verify button -> See error message on invalid OTP
Navigate to /login -> Enter email address -> Click Send OTP button -> OTP delivery fails (external email issue) -> See delivery failure message and option to resend

features.name: User Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated dashboard showing user loans, payment due dates, balances, application statuses, and links to loan details and account management.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View active loans summary -> View payment due dates -> Click on a loan to see details -> Navigate to /loans/:id -> View loan detail information
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click on a loan -> Network error fetching /loans/:id -> See error message and retry option
Navigate to /dashboard while unauthenticated -> Redirect to /login -> See OTP login form

features.name: Payment Processing
features.description: Make loan payments using card (Stripe Payment Intents) or cryptocurrency via the enhanced payment UI; process confirmations and update loan balances on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /payment/:id -> Select payment method (card) -> Enter card details via Stripe Elements -> Submit payment -> View payment confirmation

Navigate to /payment/:id -> Select payment method (crypto) -> Select cryptocurrency type -> Click Submit payment -> Navigate to /payment-enhanced/:id for enhanced crypto flow -> See payment pending/verification status
Navigate to /payment/:id -> Enter card details -> Submit payment -> Stripe returns payment failure -> See payment error message and option to retry

features.name: Payment History
features.description: Authenticated view of past transactions with expandable details, pagination, and transaction identifiers for reconciliation.
user_flows: Navigate to /payment-history -> View payment history list -> Click on a payment to expand details -> See transaction identifiers and timestamps
Navigate to /payment-history -> Use pagination controls to navigate between pages of results -> See next page of transactions
Navigate to /payment-history -> API returns empty or error -> See 'no payments found' or error state with retry CTA

features.name: Contact Form
features.description: Public contact form for user inquiries that captures user name, email, inquiry type, and message and submits to support backend.
user_flows: Navigate to /contact -> Fill name input field -> Fill email input field -> Select inquiry type dropdown -> Fill message textarea -> Click Submit button -> See success confirmation message
Navigate to /contact -> Fill name input field -> Leave message textarea blank -> Click Submit button -> See validation error prompting message content
Navigate to /contact -> Fill all fields -> Click Submit button -> Server returns error -> See submission failure message and option to retry

features.name: AI Support Chat Widget
features.description: AI-powered chat widget accessible from every page that provides instant answers via an AI backend call and can escalate to support if needed.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click chat bubble icon to open -> Type question in input field -> Click send button -> View AI-generated response
Navigate to /dashboard -> Click chat bubble icon to open -> Type question -> Click send button -> API returns error -> See chat error message and fallback to contact form

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Authenticated admin interface for viewing analytics, reviewing and deciding on loan applications, managing users, and handling KYC and support workflows.
user_flows: Navigate to /admin -> View analytics charts -> Review loan applications list -> Click on application to see details -> Approve loan application -> See application status updated
Navigate to /admin -> Click on application -> Reject loan application -> See confirmation of rejection and optional reason recorded
Navigate to /admin while logged in as non-admin -> See access forbidden or redirect to /login

features.name: Static Pages
features.description: Marketing and informational pages (About, How It Works, Rates, Resources, Careers, Legal) that provide content and allow navigation to deeper resources.
user_flows: Navigate to /about -> Read page content -> Click link to How It Works -> Navigate to /how-it-works -> Read process description
Navigate to /resources -> Click on an article -> Navigate to /resources/:slug -> Read article content
Navigate to /resources/non-existent-slug -> See 404 not found page

known_limitations.issue: Crypto payments are partially mocked with placeholder Coinbase Commerce integration
known_limitations.impact: Crypto payment verification may not work with real blockchain transactions

known_limitations.issue: Login tests require valid OTP delivery which TestSprite cannot receive
known_limitations.impact: Authenticated user flows cannot be fully tested without test credentials
